title: Two-Tailed Rat

moves.title: Call for Backup
effects: Summon another Two-Tailed Rat into an empty enemy slot

move_pattern: Randomly selects from Scratch, Disease Bite, and Screech (no move can repeat back-to-back; Screech limited to 3 uses per rat) until summoning becomes available. Once summon conditions are met, Call for Backup is chosen with 75% weight, with roughly 8% weight each for Scratch, Disease Bite, and Screech. Each individual rat may only use Call for Backup once.
notes: Call for Backup is gated by multiple conditions: (1) TurnsUntilSummonable starts at 2 and decrements with each use of Scratch, Disease Bite, or Screech — the rat cannot summon for its first 2 turns; (2) the total summon count (CallForBackupCount) is shared and synced across all Two-Tailed Rats in the encounter, capped at 3 total summons; (3) there must be an empty enemy slot available; (4) no other rat in the encounter may already be planning Call for Backup that same turn. Despite its name, Disease Bite deals damage only — no disease or debuff is applied.
